title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Texarkana, Bowie County, Texas
repository: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
citation: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Texarkana, Bowie County, Texas. Sanborn Map Company, Oct. 1885. Map. Library of Congress, Geography and Map Division. https://www.loc.gov/item/sanborn08781_001/.
notes: LOC item sanborn08781_001. Digitized Sanborn Maps Collection record with 5 sheets. LOC rights statement says the online Sanborn Maps Collection is in the public domain and free to use and reuse. Credit line: Library of Congress, Geography and Map Division, Sanborn Maps Collection.
